metadata.creator: Various
metadata.description:
The videos in this collection are from ShmooCon 2022, which occurred on 24 - 26 March 2022, at the Washington Hilton Hotel.  For more information about ShmooCon please visit https://www.shmoocon.org.

Please note that the video listed with [R] next to it was not recorded, at the request of the presenter.

Thursday, March 24, 2022:

- Opening Remarks, Rumblings, Ruminations, and Rants
- Andrew Hendela and Eric Lee - Chaos Patching: Can’t Get Hacked If I Hack Myself
- Yael Grauer - Consumer VPNs: The Good, The Bad, and The Ugly
- Mike Saxton and Trey Hoffman - GO Ahead — A Kubernetes-based, Sigma Rule Streaming Detection Engine
- Robert Weiss (pwcrack) - Practical Information Security Metrics
- Dan Astor and David Parillo - LetItGo — A Tool for Azure Tenant Domain Enumeration and Access
- Austin Read - ProcAID: Process Anomaly-based Intrusion Detection
- Russell Handorf - THYRATRON : More than TTY

Firetalks:
- Firetalks Opening
- Beau Woods - Aligning Hacker Heroes and Villains
- Christine Fossaceca and Rebecca Choynowski - Race Against the Machine: Consumers vs Bots
- Falcon Darkstar Momot - Where the Bugs Are: Data & Trends from the Penetration Testing Viewpoint
- James Troutman - VPNs Are Internet Snake Oil
- Ray [Redacted] with Lesley Carhart, Bryson Bort, & Jake Williams - Fire Starts with Sparks: Lessons Learned in Ukraine
- Firetalks Closing


Friday, March 25, 2022:

- Mike Spicer and El Kentaro - There is Wardriving, and There is GWARDRIVING
- Travis Goodspeed and EVM - A Web API for Embedded Peripheral Reverse Engineering
- Eugene Lim and Loke Hui Yi - Why No One Pwned Synology at Pwn2Own and TianFu Cup This Year: Analyzing Defensive Coding Techniques from a Vulnerability Researcher’s Perspective
- Michael Hoffman- Sceaphierde Sheep in Wolf’s Clothing
- James Chambers - Reversing the Pokémon Snap Station without a Snap Station
- Karl Koscher - HACK THE, er… HEMISPHERE! How we (legally) broadcasted hacker content to all of North America (and beyond) using an end-of-life geosynchronous satellite
- Alex Ivkin - Safe and Secure WordPress. Easy!
- Gabe Schuyler - An Introduction to Cloning RFID Keys, for Angry Bikers
[R] - Allison Wikoff - Wait a meowment, which kitten is this?
- Jackie Hicks - Coordinated Inauthentic Behavior in Honduras: An Attempt to Influence the Election Cycle
- Alyssa Rahman - Clean Up On the Serial Aisle – Developing a Systematic Hunting Methodology for Deserialization Exploits
- Kurt Opsahl - Van Buren: Everything you need to know about the Supreme Court’s recent take on the CFAA


Saturday, March 26, 2020:

- The Shmoo Group - 0wn the Con
- Rob ‘Mubix’ Fuller - Practical Crypto of InfoSec Noobs
- Katrina Cheesman and Rock Stevens - Hacking the Cyber Incident Response: How Using Words Will Help You Suck Less
- Karen Lamb, Gabby Raymond, and Maretta Morovitz - “She doesn’t even go here!” Using Denial, Deception, and Adversary Engagement for Defense
- Liam Connolly, Kathy Wang, Michael Darling, and Bruce Potter (moderator) - Closing Plenary
- Closing Remarks

----

--> Oodles of thanks to Archive for helping us keep these videos available and free!!

- Squidly1
